response.body: {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":{{jsonPath request.body '$.id'}},"result":{"tools":[{"name":"listBooks","description":"Get all books currently on the reading list","inputSchema":{"type":"object","properties":{}}},{"name":"addBook","description":"Add a new book to the reading list by providing the title, author, and status","inputSchema":{"type":"object","properties":{"title":{"type":"string"},"author":{"type":"string"},"status":{"type":"string","enum":["to_read","reading","read"]}},"required":["title","author","status"]}},{"name":"deleteBook","description":"Remove a book from the reading list by its ID","inputSchema":{"type":"object","properties":{"id":{"type":"string"}},"required":["id"]}}]}}
